pe_h2_93: What you need to know before starting
pe_summary_94: Is premature ejaculation really caused by “stress”?
pe_p_95: Stress plays only a secondary role. 90% of chronic cases have an organic cause: low serotonin, weak testosterone, or damage to the cavernous body as a result of frequent masturbation. When we treat the organic cause, the “stress” goes away on its own.
pe_summary_96: How much does the program need to show a result?
pe_p_97: Most patients notice an initial improvement in control within 7-10 days. Good control (15+ minutes) is usually achieved within 20–30 days. Permanent results are confirmed after 60 days of follow-up.
pe_summary_98: Does masturbation really cause premature ejaculation?
pe_p_99: Yes — but not directly. Frequent masturbation (daily or several times a week) weakens the cavernous tissue and makes the head of the penis extremely sensitive. It also programs the brain to "speed" rather than "control." In treatment, we repair tissues and reprogram the nervous system.
pe_summary_100: Do I need to visit a clinic?
pe_p_101: no. Diagnosis and follow-up are done entirely via Messenger. You send me your answers, I prepare the plan, and we monitor progress together. The product is shipped to you discreetly and payment is made upon receipt.
pe_summary_102: What if the formula doesn't suit me?
pe_p_103: Full 90 day warranty. If you don't get a real improvement, we'll give you a full refund — even if you use the entire product. The recovery rate is less than 2%.

pe_p_105: Most men delay seeking help for 3-5 years — and the longer you delay, the greater the damage. The first step is completely free: a confidential conversation with Dr. Sarah on Messenger.
